title: App Content Loading and Display
entry_point: init() — called on DOMContentLoaded or immediately if DOM is already ready
activity_flow: init(): call initAnchorScroll, initHashTracking, initLensEffect, initScrollReveal, initGlassTerminal, initFrameworkViz, initFoundationGrid, initSectionNav
→ initGalleryStack()                  [sets up card stack UI + event listeners]
Build antipatternMap (name → items) from antipatterns array
Generate panelsHTML: patterns.map → <div> with escapeHtml(item) for each list item
Attach click delegate: activate selected tab/panel pair
querySelector('.commands-gallery') → if found, inject error HTML with Retry button (onclick: location.reload())
getElementById('patterns-categories') → if found, inject error HTML with Retry button (onclick: location.reload())
key_functions: init(): void — orchestrates all startup; calls loadContent()
loadContent(): async — parallel fetch of /api/commands and /api/patterns; parses JSON; delegates rendering; catches → showLoadError
showLoadError(error): void — injects error UI into .commands-gallery and #patterns-categories
escapeHtml(value: string): string — XSS-safe HTML escape; used inside renderPatternsWithTabs
renderPatternsWithTabs(patterns, antipatterns): void — builds tabbed UI; attaches click delegation
initGalleryStack(): void — wires up card stack prev/next buttons and wheel events
state: allCommands: array (module-level) — populated by loadContent(), consumed by renderTerminalLayout
decision_points: DOM readyState check → DOMContentLoaded listener vs immediate init()
try/catch in loadContent → branch to showLoadError on any failure
escapeHtml: typeof value !== 'string' → return empty string
showLoadError: element existence checks before injecting HTML
dom_targets: #patterns-categories — patterns render target + error injection target
important_notes: loadContent is async; all rendering is gated behind both API calls succeeding (Promise.all). escapeHtml is the sole XSS guard and is applied to all user-facing text in renderPatternsWithTabs. Error recovery is user-driven (page reload button only — no automatic retry).
